---
title: "Introducing spatial microsimulation with R: A practical"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Introducing spatial microsimulation with R: A practical. *National Centre for Research Methods*."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_introducing_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "National Centre for Research Methods"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://eprints.ncrm.ac.uk/3348/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This practical guide introduces the fundamental principles of spatial microsimulation using the R programming language. It is designed to assist researchers in building their first models for population synthesis and analysis."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** National Centre for Research Methods
**Year:** 2014

[URL](http://eprints.ncrm.ac.uk/3348/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This practical guide introduces the fundamental principles of spatial microsimulation using the R programming language. It is designed to assist researchers in building their first models for population synthesis and analysis.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Introducing spatial microsimulation with R: A practical. *National Centre for Research Methods*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_introducing_2014,
	title = {Introducing spatial microsimulation with {R}: a practical},
	volume = {08},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://eprints.ncrm.ac.uk/3348/},
	abstract = {This practical guide introduces the fundamental principles of spatial microsimulation using the R programming language. It is designed to assist researchers in building their first models for population synthesis and analysis.},
	number = {14},
	journal = {National Centre for Research Methods},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2014},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
